title: Player HUD and debug overlay separation
summary: Replace the default diagnostics harness surface with a player HUD and move diagnostics into explicit dev/debug mode.
acceptance: Default HUD shows current state, next goal, resources, resident state, events/tasks and night risk
Diagnostics/Product Gate information is hidden or clearly gated behind dev/debug mode by default
HUD uses localized strings and M8 visual identity tokens
UI remains read-model-only and does not mutate authoritative simulation state
Covered by Web/desktop E2E asserting default player UI versus debug overlay

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Replaced the default post-start diagnostics-dominant shell with a player HUD, gated Product Gate/storage evidence behind wmDiagnostics=1, added localized HUD chrome and M8 token styling, and covered default-vs-debug behavior in Web/Desktop E2E; required checks passed.

changes_requested: High: default HUD is not viewport-bounded. At 1424x861 the task card extends below the viewport and events/resident-watch are clipped; at 390x720 the compact inspector starts offscreen and overlaps the HUD, so required events/tasks/resident state are not reliably visible/reachable despite diagnostics being gated.

Repaired WM-0117 viewport issues by replacing the post-start HUD's overlap-prone rails with viewport-bounded desktop columns and a compact stacked layout, added focused Web E2E reachability coverage at 1424x861 and 390x720, preserved diagnostics gating/read-model-only behavior, and all required validation commands passed.

verified: No blocking findings; verified viewport-bounded default HUD at 1424x861 and compact 390x720 via Web E2E, default/debug gating via Web/Desktop E2E, and read-model-only UI diff with no sim/worker changes; required gates rerun pass.

Rebased on origin/main at 5cc00c8; integrated verified player HUD/debug overlay separation commit 3acdb4a; full integration gate passed: typecheck, Web/Desktop E2E, handoff validate, taskctl validate/status, diff check, quality.

forbiddenPaths: Worker protocol changes unless separately reviewed

review.summary: No blocking findings; verified viewport-bounded default HUD at 1424x861 and compact 390x720 via Web E2E, default/debug gating via Web/Desktop E2E, and read-model-only UI diff with no sim/worker changes; required gates rerun pass.

integration.summary: Rebased on origin/main at 5cc00c8; integrated verified player HUD/debug overlay separation commit 3acdb4a; full integration gate passed: typecheck, Web/Desktop E2E, handoff validate, taskctl validate/status, diff check, quality.
